items.name: D.E.G ARO-51 Pathfinder Vest
items.description:
The AR0-51 Pathfinder vest under the D.E.G faction serves as a unique relic of an antique set. 

The ARO-51 Pathfinder set was typically worn by D.E.G Handlers who would handle communication between central command and other mercenaries on the field. 

Deadly, and armed to the brink with heavy airborne ordinance capabilities they were later reassigned to V.I.P Asset Protection service. 

Eventually, it made its first major mark on history though a confidential incident leading to its retirement after display of heavy suppression power of the Pathfinder set.

 Investors were concerned with the power hold these sets had and requested successors with lighter capabilities but more advanced.

LORE ADAPTED FROM: Alexia

items.name: Devil Sword Vergil | DMC/Devil May Cry 5
items.description:
"All things end, Dante - even us."

A blade of sin that was created when Vergil merged the legendary katana Yamato with his own human flesh and skin, birthing a weapon so powerful that even a devil may cry. Similar to his brother's sword, this blade has a look akin to Vergil's Sin Devil Trigger form.
Thanks to @Twiggy435 for being the first one to buy this accessory!!

Unsheathed Version - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/125899588777868/Devil-Sword-Vergil-Unsheathed
Matching Coat - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/119584545106100/Vergils-motivation-coat-DMC5/
My other accessories: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?CatalogContext=1&Category=1&CreatorName=req_ng&salesTypeFilter=1
